title: senecio balansae
intro: Senecio balansae, a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae), is also known as Balansa ragwort. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Senecio balansae is typically dried and used in tea, infusions, or as a powder to be consumed for its medicinal properties.
